languages.text: Впереди ждала неизвестность. Света люменов хватало только на то, чтобы увидеть гладкие стены, уходящие в темноту глубоко внизу, и бесчисленные платформы, парящие над пустотой. Я отказался подвергать свою персону опасности ради разведки, и потомок был{mf||а} вынужден{mf||а} отдать приказ простолюдинам. Лишенные благословенной аугментики, слуги срывались и соскальзывали в пропасть, но все же выжившие сумели обнаружить в стенах скрытые проходы.

traits.locale_text: Внизу ждала полная неизвестность. Света люменов хватало лишь на то, чтобы осветить гладкие, точно полированные стены, уходящие в клубящуюся тьму. Это чуждое строение было явной ловушкой, и подвергать драгоценную персону Вольного Торговца такому риску было бы верхом неосмотрительности. Потомок, скрепя сердце, был вынужден согласиться со мной. Я приказал спуститься челяди. Лишенные благословенной аугментики, они не могли надежно уцепиться за скользкий металл. Мрак поглотил многих сорвавшихся, но их гибель принесла плоды: выжившие сумели обнаружить в стенах скрытые проходы, ведущие в узкие технические тоннели.

languages.text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.
languages.original_text: Впереди ждала неизвестность. Света люменов хватало только на то, чтобы увидеть гладкие стены, уходящие в темноту глубоко внизу, и бесчисленные платформы, парящие над пустотой. Я отказался подвергать свою персону опасности ради разведки, и потомок был{mf||а} вынужден{mf||а} отдать приказ простолюдинам. Лишенные благословенной аугментики, слуги срывались и соскальзывали в пропасть, но все же выжившие сумели обнаружить в стенах скрытые проходы.

traits.locale_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slid into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

The unknown awaited below. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my descendant was forced to give orders to {mf|his|her} retainers. Stripped of their blessed augmetics, the servants slipped and slid into the chasm, but the survivors still managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

There was no knowing what lay ahead. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slid into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

languages.text: 前方的一切都是未知。{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}只能勉强照亮延伸进黑暗的光滑墙体，以及悬浮在虚空中的无数平台。我不愿为了区区侦察任务而以身试险。于是，我的继承人只得命令凡人前去探路。由于没有受祝过的植入物可以依仗，这些仆从纷纷失去平衡，滑入深渊。尽管如此，仍有幸存者在墙体上发现了隐藏通道。
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

traits.locale_text: 前方的一切都是未知。{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}只能勉强照亮延伸进黑暗的光滑墙体，以及悬浮在虚空中的无数平台。我不愿为了区区侦察任务而以身试险。于是，我的继承人只得命令凡人前去探路。由于没有受祝过的植入物可以依仗，这些仆从纷纷失去平衡，滑入深渊。尽管如此，仍有幸存者在墙体上发现了隐藏通道。

languages.text: No había forma de saber qué había más adelante. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apenas proporcionaban la luz necesaria para revelar las paredes lisas que se adentraban en la oscuridad y el sinfín de plataformas que flotaban sobre el vacío. Me negué a arriesgar mi persona para una tarea de reconocimiento, así que mi hereder{mf|o|a} delegó la tarea en la plebe. Sin aumentos bendecidos de los que depender. Los sirvientes perdieron el equilibrio y se precipitaron al abismo. Sin embargo, los que sobrevivieron pudieron encontrar pasadizos secretos ocultos en las paredes.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

traits.locale_text: No había forma de saber qué había más adelante. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apenas proporcionaban la luz necesaria para revelar las paredes lisas que se adentraban en la oscuridad y el sinfín de plataformas que flotaban sobre el vacío. Me negué a arriesgar mi persona para una tarea de reconocimiento, así que mi hereder{mf|o|a} delegó la tarea en la plebe. Sin aumentos bendecidos de los que depender. Los sirvientes perdieron el equilibrio y se precipitaron al abismo. Sin embargo, los que sobrevivieron pudieron encontrar pasadizos secretos ocultos en las paredes.

languages.text: C'est l'inconnu qui nous attendait en contrebas. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} nous fournissaient juste assez de lumière pour laisser apparaître des parois lisses à perte de vue dans les ténèbres et d'innombrables plateformes flottant au-dessus du vide. Il était hors de question que je prenne des risques inconsidérés pour une simple mission de reconnaissance, et {mf|mon descendant|ma descendante} dut donc donner des ordres à ses gens. Privés de leurs augmétiques bénis, les serviteurs perdirent l'équilibre et tombèrent au fond du gouffre, mais les survivants parvinrent tout de même à découvrir des passages cachés dans les parois.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

traits.locale_text: C'est l'inconnu qui nous attendait en contrebas. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} nous fournissaient juste assez de lumière pour laisser apparaître des parois lisses à perte de vue dans les ténèbres et d'innombrables plateformes flottant au-dessus du vide. Il était hors de question que je prenne des risques inconsidérés pour une simple mission de reconnaissance, et {mf|mon descendant|ma descendante} dut donc donner des ordres à ses gens. Privés de leurs augmétiques bénis, les serviteurs perdirent l'équilibre et tombèrent au fond du gouffre, mais les survivants parvinrent tout de même à découvrir des passages cachés dans les parois.

languages.text: Bizi neyin beklediğini bilmenin imkânı yoktu. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lümenler{/g}, karanlığın derinliklerine uzanan pürüzsüz duvarları ve boşluğun üzerinde asılı duran sayısız platformu ortaya çıkaracak kadar ışık sağlıyordu. Keşif amacıyla şahsımın güvenliğimi riske atmayı reddettim. Bu yüzden vârisim, sıradan insanlara emir vermek zorunda kaldı. Güvenebilecekleri kutsanmış ogmetikleri olmayan hizmetkârlar, ayakları kayarak uçuruma düştü. Yine de hayatta kalanlar, duvarlardaki gizli geçitleri keşfetmeyi başardılar.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

traits.locale_text: Bizi neyin beklediğini bilmenin imkânı yoktu. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lümenler{/g}, karanlığın derinliklerine uzanan pürüzsüz duvarları ve boşluğun üzerinde asılı duran sayısız platformu ortaya çıkaracak kadar ışık sağlıyordu. Keşif amacıyla şahsımın güvenliğimi riske atmayı reddettim. Bu yüzden vârisim, sıradan insanlara emir vermek zorunda kaldı. Güvenebilecekleri kutsanmış ogmetikleri olmayan hizmetkârlar, ayakları kayarak uçuruma düştü. Yine de hayatta kalanlar, duvarlardaki gizli geçitleri keşfetmeyi başardılar.

languages.text: Niemand wusste, was kommen würde. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} spendeten gerade genug Licht, um die in die Dunkelheit führenden Wände und zahllose über der Leere schwebende Plattformen zu erhellen. Als ich mich weigerte, die Sicherheit meiner Person für Aufklärungszwecke zu gefährden, war mein Nachkomme gezwungen, gewöhnliche Soldaten damit zu betrauen. Ohne gesegnete Augmentationen verlorenen die Diener den Halt und stürzten in die Tiefe. Die Überlebenden entdeckten allerdings geheime Gänge in den Wänden.
languages.original_text: There was no knowing what lay ahead. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumens{/g} provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down into the darkness, and countless platforms hovering over the void. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my scion had to give the order to commoners. With no blessed augmetics to rely on, the servants lost their footing and slipped into the chasm. Nevertheless, the ones that survived managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.

traits.locale_text: Niemand wusste, was kommen würde. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} spendeten gerade genug Licht, um die in die Dunkelheit führenden Wände und zahllose über der Leere schwebende Plattformen zu erhellen. Als ich mich weigerte, die Sicherheit meiner Person für Aufklärungszwecke zu gefährden, war mein Nachkomme gezwungen, gewöhnliche Soldaten damit zu betrauen. Ohne gesegnete Augmentationen verlorenen die Diener den Halt und stürzten in die Tiefe. Die Überlebenden entdeckten allerdings geheime Gänge in den Wänden.

languages.text: 未知の領域が広がっていた。ルミナスが照らす壁は、闇へと続く滑らかな面だった。私は偵察のため、自分の安全を危険にさらすことはなかった。従って、私の子孫は家臣たちに命令を下した。祝福された増幅器を失った家臣たちは、滑り落ち、転がり落ちたが、生き残った者たちは壁に隠された通路を発見した。
languages.original_text: The unknown awaited below. Lumens provided just enough light to reveal smooth walls stretching down and down into the darkness. I refused to risk the safety of my person for the purposes of reconnaissance, and so my descendant was forced to give orders to {mf|his|her} retainers. Stripped of their blessed augmetics, the servants slipped and slid into the chasm, but the survivors still managed to discover hidden passages in the walls.
